title: Chest Boat GUI
body:
[![Stop Chat Control](https://i.imgur.com/bdyRbOk.png)](https://fightchatcontrol.eu)

# Chest boat GUI

[![Buy me a coffee](https://img.shields.io/badge/Buy%20me%20a%20coffe-Ko--fi-f16061?logo=ko-fi)](https://ko-fi.com/opekope2)

**Chest boat GUI** is an [OptiGUI](https://modrinth.com/mod/optigui) resource pack with rounded corners, which replaces the GUI of vanilla chest boats. It was inspired by [Colourful containers GUI](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/colourful-containers-gui/) resource pack.

The dark version is based on [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/) Dark UI.

Currently requires OptiGUI 2.1.0-beta.1 or newer.

[![BisectHosting banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/a661d818-b1af-427c-9754-12e8b243fd60.png)](https://bisecthosting.com/opekope2)

## Screenshots

See [gallery](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/chest-boat-gui/gallery) for screenshots.

All screenshots in the gallery were created using
* [Complementary Shaders v4](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-shaders-v4)
* [Underground Rivers [Tech Demo]](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/underground-rivers-tech-demo)

## OptiFine

OptiFine is not supported, as it is missing the ability to
* read OptiGUI resources
* replace chest boat GUIs
